programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Talked to Dogs
programme.desc: Celebrity dog trainer Mark Stover and his wife, Linda, built a thriving business and a beautiful home but their dream life didn't last. An affair led to a bitter divorce. Then Mark vanished in a mystery with the makings of a Hollywood thriller.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Gathering Storm
programme.desc: Russel Douglas was a troubled father hoping for a fresh start when he was found shot dead in his car. The investigation would turn up few clues until an anonymous tipster sent detectives on an international manhunt to unravel a mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: It was Easter Sunday. The Stock family celebrated at home. Hours later, gunshots turned their farmhouse into a house of horrors. There was an arrest but one tiny clue didn't fit. This case was far from being solved.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Someone Was Watching
programme.desc: It was a plot straight out of an Alfred Hitchcock film. A woman peers into a neighbor’s yard and catches a glimpse of something unsettling. What she saw and what she did set a chain of events in motion that would divide a family and a jury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: First Love, Last Breath
programme.desc: When a lovesick teen goes missing, investigators in Indiana learn she's harboring a deep secret. And when a couple of teens make a horrifying discovery in the woods, it's clear the secrets in one high school run darker and deeper than they imagined.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale
programme.desc: When a private investigator disappears with tens of thousands of dollars, Florida detectives question whether she's alive and well. But when a buried body is uncovered, they chase a trail of secrets and lies to catch a killer just out of reach.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Grief or Guilt
programme.desc: A beloved high school track star vanishes into the Philadelphia night and those in her innermost circle are eyed as suspects. When a terrifying scene is unearthed in the nearby woods, a family demands answers, but nobody is prepared for the truth. .

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Friend Left Behind
programme.desc: A party in the woods of a Pennsylvania coal mining town takes a chilling turn when someone goes missing. Investigators have more questions than answers and when the summer thaw brings a shocking discovery, it's clear someone is hiding a deadly truth.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Girl in the Grave
programme.desc: A hike in the woods of the Hollywood Hills takes a terrifying turn when a dog digs up a female foot. As panic spreads through a Southern California community a family fears for its own safety and investigators will stop at nothing to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: Life looks bright for a new college graduate. But when her beloved car is found abandoned, investigators race to find the missing girl. Weeks later, a psychic comes forward delivering unforeseen answers and an appalling twist no one sees coming.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Don't Unlock the Freezer
programme.desc: Examine true-crime stories of victims found buried in the most unsuspecting of places.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Under the Crawlspace
programme.desc: When a friendly bet exposes a terrifying scene under a California home, investigators unravel a 14-year-old missing person's case. Eventually, when deeply buried secrets come to light, and a dark family truth is revealed, justice is finally served.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Last Person Inside
programme.desc: When a concerned neighbor stumbles onto a horrifying scene in a Spokane, Washington home, a family is devastated and some buried secrets come to light. Investigators unravel a bizarre web of truths and lies to find enough evidence to catch a killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thank God It's Doomsday
programme.desc: A religious movie and subsequent coincidences convince Homer that the Rapture is nigh, and the folks of Springfield, God love 'em, take him at his word.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pray Anything
programme.desc: Homer is jealous of his neighbour Flanders' good luck and decides to take a leap of faith.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pulpit Friction
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend in town. But Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, Reverend Lovejoy, when Homer starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Skeptic
programme.desc: Lisa unearths a skeleton in the meadow where a new mega-mall is being constructed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Defined
programme.desc: Homer accidentally saves the nuclear power plant, becomes a hero and is admired by Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Comet
programme.desc: Springfield's days are numbered when Bart discovers a comet heading straight for the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge vs. the Monorail
programme.desc: It's Marge versus the residents of Springfield when she disapproves of the construction of a completely useless monorail in town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Radio Bart
programme.desc: Bart receives a radio microphone, which he uses to play practical jokes on everyone.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Inner Child
programme.desc: While at a self-help seminar, Bart is singled out by the lecturer and the townspeople are told they should strive to be more like him. Chaos soon reigns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lemon of Troy
programme.desc: Bart leads a group of boys in taking back the town's lemon tree, which has been stolen.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network
programme.desc: As the mastermind behind the online social networking phenomenon 'SpringFace,' Lisa is called to trial when Springfield's obsession with the site becomes chaotic and dysfunctional.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Itchy & Scratchy Land
programme.desc: A family trip to Itchy and Scratchy Land proves heavenly until the robots go crazy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School
programme.desc: Homer joins the 'Springfield Preppers,' an off-the-grid survivalist group whose leader has set up a top-secret retreat outside of town to prepare for the end of the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Springfield Files
programme.desc: Homer claims to have witnessed something out of this world in the Springfield woods.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Frink Gets Testy
programme.desc: Fearing that the end of the world is near, Mr. Burns tasks Dr. Frink with testing all of Springfield to determine who is worth saving. The results shake the Simpson family to their core.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Brother From Another Series
programme.desc: Bart suspects a sinister motive when Sideshow Bob reunites with his estranged brother, Cecil. When Lisa and Bart uncover evidence, Cecil reveals that he is the one who is out to destroy Springfield with a new dam.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Tree Hugger
programme.desc: Lisa tries to save Springfield's oldest Redwood by spending four days in the tree.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Two Cars in Every Garage and Three Eyes on Every Fish
programme.desc: Montgomery Burns decides to run for Governor in order to keep the nuclear plant open.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Squirt and the Whale
programme.desc: The Simpsons decide to embrace a cheaper, alternate source of energy by erecting a wind turbine in their backyard. When Homer realizes that some of the power is being directed to the local electric company, he decides to remove his home from the grid.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart After Dark
programme.desc: As punishment for destroying private property, Homer insists Bart works for the homeowner to pay off the damages. He soon discovers the house is actually a burlesque parlour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Mother
programme.desc: Bart becomes the proud caretaker of a species that could endanger life in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Australia
programme.desc: The gov. of Australia is not impressed with Bart's prank call; he demands an apology.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E-I-E-I D'oh!
programme.desc: Homer moves the family to an old farm where he and Bart grow an addictive crop of Tomacco.

programme.title: The Simpsons: She Used to Be My Girl
programme.desc: Marge runs into her former high school pal Chloe Talbot who is now a famous newscaster.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Missionary Impossible
programme.desc: In an attempt to keep his favourite TV show on the air, Homer anonymously pledges $10,000.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: Mr. Burns organizes a mountain retreat to promote teamwork and finds himself paired with Homer. While the rest of the family looks for things to do, Homer and Mr. Burns are trapped in the cabin by an avalanche.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Plow
programme.desc: Homer becomes Mr. Plow but competition gets out of hand when Barney gets in on the action.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trash of the Titans
programme.desc: Homer insults his garbage men and when his trash is uncollected, he runs for Commissioner.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Changing of the Guardian
programme.desc: After surviving a tornado, Marge and Homer seek out guardians for the kids, in case the worst should happen. They first turn to friends and family, including Homer's half-brother.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hurricane Neddy
programme.desc: A hurricane comes through Springfield and spares everyone but the Flanders home. After thieves loot Ned's store and his rebuilt home crumbles to the ground, Ned suffers a nervous breakdown and checks into an asylum.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fear of Flying
programme.desc: Marge's fear of flying is revealed after the family earns a free trip anywhere in the U.S.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brake My Wife, Please
programme.desc: When a Judge takes Homer's driver's license away, Marge is forced to do all the driving.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Hit By a Car
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns hits Bart with his car he is only willing to pay $100, Homer sues for more.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys
programme.desc: When the Simpsons discover a collection of keys, which open every door in Springfield, Lisa stumbles upon an eerie hidden classroom beneath Springfield Elementary School.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Das Bus
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are in a United Nations club with other kids and set out on a field trip. An accident results in the students becoming stranded on a deserted island. Meanwhile, Homer decides to create his own Internet company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 24 Minutes
programme.desc: With the help of Jack Bauer and Chloe O'Brian, Bart and Lisa must stop a group of bullies from releasing the ultimate stink bomb at the school's annual bake sale.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Murderer
programme.desc: After having a lousy day at school, Bart accidentally stumbles into a mobster front.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty Gets Busted
programme.desc: Krusty is suspected of robbing the Kwik-E-Mart when a man dressed like him performs the deed. Bart doesn't believe his hero would rob anyone and vows to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Day of the Jackanapes
programme.desc: After training Bart to do away with Krusty for good, Sideshow Bob has a change of heart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sideshow Bob's Last Gleaming
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob escapes from prison, steals a bomb and hides out in a blimp. When he threatens to detonate a bomb, the town gives in to his only demand and ceases production of all television shows.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill the Alligator and Run
programme.desc: Homer gets caught up in the chaos of spring break fever during a vacation in Florida.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge in Chains
programme.desc: Marge gets busted for shoplifting at the Kiwk-E-Mart and is sentenced to 30 days in prison. Bart concocts a brilliant scheme to break her out of jail that involves a party dress, a wig and a crowbar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is distraught at the less-than-sensitive response to his news that he has only weeks to live. When he ends up at the Simpson's home, Marge and Homer decide it's payback time, while Lisa stands up for the old man.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Blink
programme.desc: A young woman finds cryptic messages from 1969 coming from a stranger called the Doctor when people start disappearing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Silence in the Library
programme.desc: After landing in an abandoned library in the 51st century, the Doctor, Donna and a team of archaeologists face a swarm of flesh-eating creatures that are seen only as shadows.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Forest of the Dead
programme.desc: As the shadows rise, the Doctor forges an alliance with the mysterious River Song. While the Doctor discovers secrets and revelations about his own future, the sinister Nodes declare that Donna is doomed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Amy's Choice
programme.desc: After being going for five years, the Doctor reappears in Amy's life and she is faced with having to make a terrible choice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vincent and the Doctor
programme.desc: Amy finds herself battling a deadly alien in France with none other than Vincent Van Gogh.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Day of the Doctor
programme.desc: In 2013, something terrible is awakening in London's National Gallery. In 1562, a murderous plot is afoot in Elizabethan England. Meanwhile, somewhere in space an ancient battle reaches its devastating conclusion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
programme.desc: The Doctor must sacrifice everything to save a town called Christmas from the Time Lord's greatest enemies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The End of Time
programme.desc: It's the Tenth Doctor's final journey and his psychotic nemesis the Master has been reborn, on Christmas Eve. The Doctor faces the end of his life as the Master's plans hurtle out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of the Doctor
programme.desc: The Doctor must sacrifice everything to save a town called Christmas from the Time Lord's greatest enemies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Rosa
programme.desc: Montgomery, Alabama. 1955. The Doctor and her friends find themselves in the Deep South of America. As they encounter a seamstress by the name of Rosa Parks, they begin to wonder whether someone is attempting to change history.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Arachnids in the UK
programme.desc: Once the Doctor and her crew find their way back to Yorkshire, they find something stirring amongst the eight-legged arachnid population of Sheffield.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Woman Who Fell to Earth
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who is unable to remember her own name falls from the night sky, and forever changes the lives of Ryan Sinclair, Yasmin Khan, and Graham O'Brien.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Demons of the Punjab
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers demons haunting the land of Punjab, India in 1947, while the country is being torn apart.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Kerblam!
programme.desc: A mysterious message arrives in a package addressed to the Doctor, leading her, Graham, Yaz and Ryan to investigate the warehouse moon orbiting Kandoka, and the home of the galaxy's largest retailer: Kerblam!

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spyfall, Part One
programme.desc: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces. MI6 turns to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe for answers, attacks come from all sides.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spyfall, Part Two
programme.desc: A terrifying plan to destroy humanity is about to reach fruition. Can the Doctor and her friends escape multiple traps and defeat a deadly alliance?

programme.title: Doctor Who: Nikola Tesla's Night of Terror
programme.desc: On the edge of Niagara Falls in 1903, the Doctor and friends discover something, or someone, is sabotaging Nikola Tesla's generating station.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Fugitive of the Judoon
programme.desc: Ko Sho Blo! Trigger-happy space police the Judoonare targeting 21st century Gloucester. The Doctor, Yaz, Ryan and Graham race back to Earth in order to prevent them doing too much damage to the cathedral city.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Can You Hear Me?
programme.desc: From ancient Syria, to present day Sheffield, and out into the wilds of space, something is stalking the Doctor and her friends.

programme.desc: We revisit spring, the busiest time of the year at the clinic. For Dr. Pol, that means long and tiring days. We check back on his search for another veterinarian.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Deserted and the Doomed
programme.desc: From secluded islands to cities perched along cliffs, abandoned structures and failed engineering projects can be found in the world's most remote locations; using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Deserted and the Doomed
programme.desc: From secluded islands to cities perched along cliffs, abandoned structures and failed engineering projects can be found in the world's most remote locations; using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer
programme.desc: In the 1970s a serial rapist is on the loose in northern California. And just as his reign of terror over the community wanes, police discover he isn't just a serial rapist, he's a serial murderer and he's been killing people all over California.

programme.title: Chris Watts: An ID Murder Mystery
Fear Thy Roommate: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Two college girls rent an apartment off campus together, but they couldn't be more different. Little arguments escalate into an all-out war, and the presence of a boyfriend sends the feud over into a spiral of mutual hate ending in a deadly fight.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: Into the Past
programme.desc: 7-year-old JJ Vallow and 17-year-old Tylee Ryan have been missing for months. Their mother Lori Vallow defies a court order to appear in Idaho with her children. And JJ's grandparents, Larry and Kay Woodcock, embark on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: End Times
programme.desc: Lori Vallow is extradited from Hawaii to Rexburg, Idaho to face charges of deserting her missing children, JJ and Tylee. Kay and Larry continue to search for answers and try to remain hopeful, but in the summer of 2020, the case takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: Into the Past
programme.desc: 7-year-old JJ Vallow and 17-year-old Tylee Ryan have been missing for months. Their mother Lori Vallow defies a court order to appear in Idaho with her children. And JJ's grandparents, Larry and Kay Woodcock, embark on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: End Times
programme.desc: Lori Vallow is extradited from Hawaii to Rexburg, Idaho to face charges of deserting her missing children, JJ and Tylee. Kay and Larry continue to search for answers and try to remain hopeful, but in the summer of 2020, the case takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Two college girls rent an apartment off campus together, but they couldn't be more different. Little arguments escalate into an all-out war, and the presence of a boyfriend sends the feud over into a spiral of mutual hate ending in a deadly fight.

programme.title: Andrea Yates: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: Andrea Yates appears to have the perfect family. But when her fascination with extreme religious ideas and hidden postpartum psychosis lead her to believe Satan is sending messages, she drowns all five of her children, and a media firestorm ensues.

programme.title: Atlanta Olympic Bombing: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: At the 1996 Olympics, a security guard discovers pipe bombs and clears the area to minimize fatalities. Praised as a hero, the FBI then decides he fits the profile of a domestic terrorist, while the real villain continues his terror campaign.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: The Menendez Brothers
programme.desc: When a Hollywood executive and his wife are brutally killed in a wealthy neighbourhood, suspicion falls on their two sons. Charged with the murders, the brothers reveal disturbing family secrets, and the scene is set for one of the most shocking trials.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: Selena
programme.desc: A Mexican-American singer is on the cusp of international superstardom when one fateful visit to a Texas motel cuts her young life tragically short. Fans clamor for justice as police negotiators stand-off with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: The Crimes That Changed Us: The Nanny Trial
programme.desc: Louise Woodward, an 18-year-old au pair from Britain, is accused of murdering eight-month-old Matthew Eappen by violently shaking him. Her trial creates a media firestorm, searing the term 'shaken baby syndrome' into America's consciousness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Collision Course
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street. When a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Manifesto
programme.desc: A cabin on the slopes of Pikes Peak catches fire, and a young sheriff's deputy is posted to guard the scene overnight. When he's found dead in his patrol car the next morning, his fellow lawmen must set aside their grief and hunt down his killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Special OPS
programme.desc: In war, some missions require elite fighting squads and secret, cutting edge military machinery. Unveiling the latest in weapons and tech of Special Forces.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Special OPS
programme.desc: In war, some missions require elite fighting squads and secret, cutting edge military machinery. Unveiling the latest in weapons and tech of Special Forces.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Raid on the Reactor
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the government of Israel is releasing top secret documents detailing the secret plans, strategies and implementation of their raid on the Iraqi nuclear facility in 1981, one of the most daring and successful military strikes ever.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: House Pest
programme.desc: When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Karate Kidder/ Playing Favorites
programme.desc: Dave, Simon and Theodore are worried for Alvin's safety after Alvin enters a karate contest. Later, when Alvin suspects Simon is Dave's favorite, he and Theo challenge Simon to a go-cart race to win Dave's favor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lost in Space...Camp/ Super Hot Chocolate
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to Basics/ Report Cards
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Simon has lost his mind after he fails a school test and moves into a tree for some alone time. Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything he can to intercept the mail before Dave sees it.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: Toads and Tiaras/ Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde babysit Lily.

programme.title: The Loud House: Teacher's Union/ Head Poet's Anxiety
programme.desc: To try and make gym class better, Lincoln and Clyde set Coach Pacowski and Mrs. Johnson up. Luan mentors Lucy teaching her how to manage the ups and downs of pursuing a life in the arts.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SquarePants Family Vacation
programme.desc: While on a family road trip to the Great Barrier Reef, SpongeBob and Patrick get lost and end up on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?/ Planet of the Jellyfish
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward make a happiest memory for himself; SpongeBob and Sandy have to defeat an evil Jellien overlord who's replaced everyone in Bikini Bottom with clones.

programme.title: It's Pony: Delivery Pony/ Magic Annie
programme.desc: Annie and Pony's new fruit and vegetable delivery service is threatened by a big corporation. Annie needs to find the perfect Mother's Day gift. Pony is convinced that Annie's magic trick is just the thing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Texas/ Walking Small
programme.desc: Sandy is homesick for 'good ol' Texas'; Plankton convinces SpongeBob to be mean.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Gary becomes obsessed with his new red ball, forcing SpongeBob to take drastic measures to intervene.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Neighbors/ School
programme.desc: Squidwad plays a trick on Spongebob. Patrick makes them believe their no longer friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Procrastination/ I'm With Stupid
programme.desc: Bob is easily distracted from an essay; Bob and Pat attempt to prove who's smarter.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Hat for Pat/ Toy Store of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs offers Patrick a job as a sign-holder. SpongeBob and Patrick spend the night locked in a toy store.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: Pasture Bedtime/ Shop Girl
programme.desc: The boys struggle with whether to attend Liam's barn sleepover or Girl Jordan's awesome pool party.

programme.title: The Loud House: Patching Things Up/ Cheater by the Dozen
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts but discover one of them might be more suited for it. When Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 3
programme.desc: Tension on the ship rises as Elliott plants seeds of distrust about Will, whom Elliott suspects is collecting mission information for his reporter mother. Meanwhile, Samy works with Matilda’s inventor to probe the AI’s role in the accidental launch.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 21
programme.desc: After a small toy clogs the toilet and leaves only one working bathroom, the kids band together on a chaotic mission to dislodge the toy. On Earth, tempers flare between the parents while Matilda’s inventor devises a bold plan to hijack the AI.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 33
programme.desc: After a small toy clogs the toilet and leaves only one working bathroom, the kids band together on a chaotic mission to dislodge the toy.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 34
programme.desc: A small hole in the ship threatening the oxygen supply can only be repaired from the outside, forcing Martin to become to first kid to ever attempt a spacewalk.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Date of Emergency
programme.desc: Phoebe fakes a romance after feeling left out with her friends all in relationships, but keeping her lie going proves to be harder than she expected.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Smells Like Team Spirit
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max must work together on series of superhero team building exercises, but their different approaches to training puts their future as a crime fighting team at risk.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Orange Is the New Max
programme.desc: Phoebe worries that Max will revert to his evil ways after he is asked to give a 'Scared Straight' talk to a group of young super villains in prison, but her efforts to protect Max from himself end up doing more harm than good.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Z's All That
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max get to act as a superhero mentor to one of their siblings, but quickly regret selecting Nora after seeing Billy's surprisingly impressive skillset.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Nowhere to Slide
programme.desc: The Thunder family splits up for the night when the boys decide to survive 24 hours in the wilderness, while the girls try to bond over some of Barb's favorite farm activities from her childhood.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Mad Max: Beyond Thunderhome
programme.desc: Max finally declares his independence from his parents' house rules and moves to his friend's house, where they only rule is that there are no rules. However, ultimate freedom quickly becomes more than Max can handle.

programme.desc: When a neurosurgeon loses the use of his hands in an accident, he finds himself at a mystical enclave. Healing his hands, he trains there as a sorcerer. When a new threat emerges, he must decide whether to return to his life or defend the world.

programme.title: Movie: Black Panther
programme.desc: After his father's death, T'Challa becomes both the ruler of the secretive kingdom of Wakanda and the superhero Black Panther. With outside threats looming, the young king teams up with a CIA agent to both save his kingdom and prevent a war.

programme.title: Movie: Ant-Man and the Wasp
programme.desc: Former petty criminal-turned-superhero Ant-Man teams up with new superhero the Wasp, when a woman steals dangerous quantum technology from Dr. Pym and uses it to become the Ghost, a supervillain with the ability to pass through solid objects.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Movie: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: When the world's most beautiful people are in danger, Derek and Hansel are recruited for a top secret mission to defeat criminal mastermind Mugatu.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Insider
programme.desc: While conducting an autopsy on a petty officer who is believed to have died from natural causes, an armed man enters the morgue and holds Wade, Sebastian and Danny hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rock-a-Bye-Baby
programme.desc: When a navy commander's car is stolen with his baby inside, the team must determine if this was a random carjacking or a targeted abduction.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: You'll Do
programme.desc: With no memory of the night before, Lasalle's brother, Cade, turns to NCIS for help when he finds his girlfriend's body in the trunk of his car.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: How Much Pain Can You Take?
programme.desc: To send a message to Pride, Baitfish murders someone close to the NCIS team, prompting a citywide manhunt for the elusive criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My City
programme.desc: After receiving intelligence that the ports have been breached, placing the navy and Gulf Coast in harm's way, Pride and the team follow every angle to determine what has entered their city and how they can put a stop to the Broussard Syndicate.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sic Semper Tyranis
programme.desc: After a military convoy is bombed on a New Orleans bridge, Pride and the team plan a dangerous undercover operation to retrieve a stolen missile and prevent an attack on a U.S. Naval ship.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla
programme.desc: The 'world's most famous monster' is pitted against new and deadly creatures that threaten mankind's very existence. With humanity’s scientific tampering and arrogance having offset the balance of nature, Godzilla has awoken once again to regain it.

programme.title: Movie: King Kong
programme.desc: An ambitious movie producer risks everything and takes a crew to a mysterious island, where they discover and capture a giant ape.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky II
programme.desc: In the aftermath of his infamous match with Apollo Creed, Rocky plans to settle down with the love of his life and start a family. He soon finds himself out of money, however, and has no choice but to accept Apollo's offer of a rematch.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky III
programme.desc: Three years after beating Apollo Creed, with whom he has become great friends, Balboa loses his title to Clubber Lang, who inadvertently causes the death of Mickey. Apollo helps Rocky train for a rematch against Lang so he can win the title back.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky IV
programme.desc: When Rocky's old friend Apollo Creed is killed during a fight with a super-fit Russian boxer, Ivan Drago, Rocky blames himself. Rocky arranges to fight Ivan in Russia.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: A retired boxer, known as one of the greatest, is inspired to step back into the boxing ring.

programme.desc: A displaced and naïve teenager is taught karate in order to defend himself against trained bullies.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid Part II

programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Carousel
programme.desc: A woman is hired by a Royal family to repair a carousel for them before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Bell Bride
programme.desc: A wedding planner heads off to Alaska to source a rare flower for a bride. While there, she is charmed by a handsome botanist who shows her what the town has to offer for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: A Crown for Christmas
programme.desc: After getting fired from her job at a ritzy NYC hotel, a woman accepts a job as a governess to a young girl. She finds herself attracted to the girl’s father, who is king of the country, and love reigns over the kingdom.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas List
programme.desc: Planning a storybook Christmas with her boyfriend proves challenging for a woman when he goes AWOL. A tempting new romance turns her life upside down.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: Good Morning Christmas!
programme.desc: Two squabbling TV hosts are sent to a festive small town over Christmas. While pretending to get along for the sake of appearance, they discover that there's more to each other than they thought.

programme.title: Movie: Five Star Christmas
programme.desc: When a travel writer shows up unexpectedly at their dad's B&B, the Ralston family all pretend to be guests in hopes of a good review.

programme.title: Movie: Cross Country Christmas
programme.desc: Former classmates find themselves travelling home together for the holidays. When a storm hits, they must work together to each get to their destination.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas by Starlight
programme.desc: When her family's beloved eatery, The Starlight Café, is slated for demolition, Annie vows to put a stop to it before Christmas.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: When Michael visits Dunder Mifflin corporate headquarters in New York on Valentine's Day, both he and Jan are in for a surprise. Meanwhile back in Scranton, the office staff celebrates Valentine's Day grade school style.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Life Is a Cabaret
programme.desc: It's opening night for 'Cabaret', and Stevie is nowhere to be found. David tries to make a big announcement but keeps getting overshadowed by the musical.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Smoke Signals
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Incident
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, while Johnny, Stevie, and Roland attend a viewing for a motel nearby.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira endeavour to secure an investor for a new motel, while Alexis and Ted struggle with long-distance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Maid of Honour
programme.desc: Moira shares the newly released Crows movie trailer with the Jazzagals. Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: Put It Down
programme.desc: North Korea aims for South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Unfulfilled
programme.desc: South Park is chosen to be the home for Amazon's newest Fulfilment Centre.

programme.title: South Park: Bike Parade
programme.desc: The boys' chance of winning the Bike Parade is in jeopardy when Kenny quits.

programme.title: South Park: Member Berries
programme.desc: The national anthem gets a reboot by an American icon.

programme.title: South Park: Skank Hunt
programme.desc: Kyle's dad manages to keep his identity as a troll a secret while he takes his online abuse global.

programme.title: South Park: The Damned
programme.desc: Gerald is thrilled with the media attention as he continues to troll everyone and anyone.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Indianapolis
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron head to Indianapolis to receive a commendation for the upcoming Harvest Festival.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Traveling Salesmen
programme.desc: On Andy's suggestion, Michael has staffers team up for sales calls, leading to some interesting, insightful moments in the field. Meanwhile, Dwight attempts to cover for Angela after she misses an important deadline.

programme.title: The Office: The Return
programme.desc: Oscar returns from his vacation with mixed emotions on whether or not he wants to be a part of the office. Meanwhile, Andy takes advantage of recent events to get closer to Michael. Jim turns to Karen and Pam for help to stage a prank on a new target.

programme.title: The Office: Ben Franklin
programme.desc: Acting on bad advice he received from his friend Todd Packer, Michael brings two 'adult' performers into the office in honour of Phyllis's wedding shower. Meanwhile, Karen confronts Pam about her past with Jim.

programme.title: The Office: Phyllis' Wedding
programme.desc: Phyllis regrets giving Michael an important job at her wedding after several embarrassing moments. Pam has flashbacks of her own wedding planning when she sees Phyllis's decorations. Meanwhile, Dwight is determined to catch wedding crashers.

programme.title: The Office: Business School
programme.desc: Ryan invites Michael to be a guest speaker at his business school. Meanwhile, Dwight battles a bat that gets loose in the office while Pam invites co-workers to her first art show.

programme.title: The Office: Cocktails
programme.desc: Michael and Jan go public with their relationship during a party at their CFO's home. At the party, Jim meets Karen's ex. Meanwhile, the rest of the office decides to go to happy hour for drinks.

programme.title: The Office: The Negotiation
programme.desc: Darryl decides to meet with Michael to negotiate a pay increase. Meanwhile, Jim deals with the consequences of Pam's confession to Roy.

programme.title: The Office: Safety Training
programme.desc: Andy returns to the office after several weeks of anger management training, determined to make a fresh start with all the Dunder Mifflin employees. On safety training day, Michael and Dwight try to illuminate the true dangers of the workplace.

programme.title: The Office: Product Recall
programme.desc: The office is in crisis mode after a large shipment of Dunder-Mifflin paper is accidentally sent out with an obscene watermark. In an effort to manage the media, Michael holds an impromptu press conference.

programme.title: The Office: Women's Appreciation
programme.desc: After Phyllis gets flashed in the parking lot, Dwight sets out to improve on-site security. Michael uses the situation as a pretence to bond with the female employees at the mall and to get advice on how to break up with Jan.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money Maker
programme.desc: A rich financier is found stuffed in a trashcan wearing a cloak and mask. Meanwhile, Maura makes a deeper connection with her mother and half-sister who still don't know Maura is related to them.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Crazy for You
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Jane finds herself closer to the investigation than she realizes.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cuts Like a Knife
programme.desc: A bride is killed right before she walks down the aisle, and Jane and Maura must figure out if the groom's ex-girlfriend is a suspect or if there is a deeper connection to the bride's European roots.

programme.title: Movie: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: Lorena’s journey from a wide-eyed, immigrant bride to a battered wife, and an unlikely media sensation, with her ultimately emerging as a strong, thoughtful woman who has devoted her life to advocating for other abused women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.desc: True-life mysteries where the heart of each show is motive and money.

programme.desc: Jane Andrews appears to be living the dream life with her high society beau, Tom Cressman, until he’s found stabbed to death in their home.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Self Defense or Revenge?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Killer Cookout

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.
