programme.desc: Danny and Mary go on a romantic trip to Los Angeles, amidst rumours that they will marry.

programme.title: Las Vegas: My Beautiful Launderette
programme.desc: One of Sam's clients is illegally laundering drug money through the Montecito.

programme.title: Las Vegas: When You Got to Go, You Got to Go
programme.desc: Danny and Mike frantically search the city for Ed when he is kidnapped.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Sperm Whales and Spearmint Rhinos
programme.desc: Mike is reunited with his ex-girlfriend from college who has a strange request for him.

programme.title: Las Vegas: The Lie is Cast
programme.desc: Danny's generous act gets him into trouble with the police and Ed cleans up the mess.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from a beautiful former co-worker visits Ed whose mere presence puts everyone's lives in serious danger. Danny and Mike have to protect this woman with the mysterious background. Delinda and Nessa compete for a high roller's affection.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Can You See What I See?
programme.desc: Ed decides to shake things up at the casino by switching everyone's job positions around.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Ed has jury duty on Valentine's Day, but Jillian thinks he is purposely avoiding her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: To Protect and Serve Manicotti
programme.desc: Danny and Mike feverishly work to reclaim $100,000 stolen from the casino.

programme.title: Las Vegas: One Nation, Under Surveillance
programme.desc: An ex-Marine turned local politician is embroiled in a sordid scandal with a 16-year-old.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hit Me
programme.desc: When surveillance technology fails to catch a thief, Ed must rely on human ingenuity.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Hide and Sneak
programme.desc: A high-rolling vampire mysteriously shows up in Sam's room and tries to seduce her.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Letters, Lawyer, and Loose Women
programme.desc: Mike agrees to help a hotel guest who has lost his wedding ring at a local brothel.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Magic Carpet Fred
programme.desc: A beguiling magician uses his skills to help Ed catch a slippery thief.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Centennial
programme.desc: The new owner of the Montecito will be making some changes to the personnel and property.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Viva Las Vegas
programme.desc: Ed worries that the revamped Montecito will not be ready in time for the reopening.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Fake the Money and Run
programme.desc: Ed desperately tries to keep tough new boss Monica out of the loop until he finds out who's been making counterfeit chips that could flood the casino while Danny's accountant suggests that he sell his late father's house and refers him to a realtor.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Double Down, Triple Threat
programme.desc: Danny is reunited with Dr. Jordan Cavanaugh on a quest to solve a kidnapping scheme.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Whatever Happened to Seymour Magoon?
programme.desc: Jillian sprains her ankle and convinces Ed to present their family dog at the Nevada State Dog Show. Monica buys an 80-year-old woman's house to build a golf course but things get complicated when a demolition crew uncovers a skeleton.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Found 'Em
programme.desc: Guy goes to a drive-in in Kentucky that's serving the same burgers as they did in 1951.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Owned
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a Mexican restaurant and tortilla factory in San Diego.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Swiss, Sandwiches and Sausage
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a standout spot servin' up specialties straight out of Switzerland. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky food truck dishing out grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Loaded
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the biggest and fullest loaded meals and flavours around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: British, Hawaiian and Mexican
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub from all around the globe! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a true British pub serving authentic English staples from fish and chips to Yorkshire pudding.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pretzels, Pork and Paella
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Dakota Smorgasbord
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hitting Triple-D's 50th state as he heads into Sioux Falls, SD, where a spot is taking chislic to the next level, and he finds the state's first Ethiopian joint. Plus, a Midwest-Southern mashup is putting their own stamp on comfort cooking.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: 25 Ingredients or Less
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis brings in pal Meredith Vieira to try to beat Bobby Flay in 25 ingredients or less. Chefs Marcos Campos and Nicholas Poulmetis try not to slip up on the star ingredient for a shot at taking down the king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Superchef, Supermodel
programme.desc: Superchef Anne Burrell teams up with supermodel Gigi Hadid to give Bobby a real taste of the spotlight. They're hoping international chefs Melissa Araujo and Max Robbins can blind Bobby with their brilliance and cat walk out a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: The arena gets a facelift when New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Aged to Perfection
programme.desc: Michael Strahan and Michael Symon have handpicked two chefs hoping to score a touchdown on Bobby Flay's home turf! New York chef Anastacia Song and Southern sweetie Joey Ward are prepared to bring their best game and score the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Too Biggs To Fail
programme.desc: Katie Lee and Jason Biggs put one in Bobby Flay's loss column. Their fingers are crossed that either Colombian restaurateur Sam Gorenstein or Mexican chef David Vargas can bring the heat necessary.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Exile on Lame Street
programme.desc: Fearing that Ritchie is too young to be exposed to sex, drugs and rock and roll vices on display at a Rolling Stones concert, Christine initially forbids it. Eventually, she relents but immediately regrets and in a panic, goes to the venue to keep tabs.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Some of My Best Friends Are Portuguese

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Christine volunteers to help out at Richie's spring carnival and while there, she runs into the mean moms, who are clucking over the attractive father of a new student at Westbridge. Christine is excited to learn that the hot dad is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Passion of the Christine
programme.desc: Since New Christine broke up with Richard, he's been spending a lot of time at Christine's house, leading Ritchie to believe that his parents are back together. Richard suggests that they give their relationship another try.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe

programme.title: Roseanne: Therapy

programme.desc: Becky is distraught when Roseanne and Dan inform her that their economic woes have put her college plans on hold.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne tries to lift Dan's spirits when he feels like a failure over the loss of his motorcycle shop. Also, Becky and Mark return from their elopement to face a bitter Dan and Roseanne.

programme.desc: It's Darlene's sweet sixteen and Roseanne plans a nightmarish surprise party. In a futile attempt at revenge, Darlene dyes her hair jet black. Meanwhile, Roseanne entertains the notion of investing in Jackie's business idea.

programme.desc: David helps his 14th set of Massachusetts winners find a home on Boston's South Shore. They've been living in a tiny apartment with their giant fur baby, but they hope to find a property with a huge yard where they can start a family.

programme.title: HGTV Dream Home
programme.desc: Hosts Brian Patrick Flynn and Tiffany Brooks infuse a three-story Cape-Cod with coastal-preppy flair in Portsmouth, Rhode Island. This incredible home and all its furnishings, a motorhome and $250,000 will all be given away to one lucky winner.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: G'ma's Pad
programme.desc: With 37 piercings, 89 tattoos and endless wigs, David Bromstad has never met a winner like this grandma! She wants a big house so her elderly mother can move in with a yard to fill with grandkids, and David has a $200,000 budget to find her perfect home.

programme.title: Self Made Mansions: Cookie Cutter Home
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly helps The Cut Buddy's Joshua Esnard and The Cookie Department's Akiva and Elannah Resnikoff search for dream homes. Joshua has netted $5 million from his grooming tools, while the Resnikoffs have sold millions of their Keto-friendly cookies.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Clashing Styles in Newcastle
programme.desc: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen helps a winning couple find their dream home in Newcastle, England. They need an upgrade to a single family home, but he likes modern, while she likes traditional. It's going to be tricky to find them a home they both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Postcode Matters in Plymouth, England
programme.desc: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen lands on the shore in Plymouth, England to help Wayne. Unable to work after an accident, Wayne's luck changed after he and his mom won 'The People's Postcode Lottery.' Laurence takes them both on a ride to find his dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bangor or Bust
programme.desc: Nick won $100,000 from a scratch off and now he and his wife Robyn want to buy their forever home in Bangor, Pennsylvania. David is challenged to find them a single-family home on a very small budget, and they want a three-car garage as well.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flipping and Dating
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Diamond Bar, CA, and asks Christina to meet him to view the property. Tarek rushes off for a date and Christina pokes fun at him. The underlying tension leads to a blowout.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big House, Big Budget
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a risk on a huge home in pricey Anaheim Hills, CA, in hopes of making more money after sharing the profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk-Pile Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a small home with big problems in Long Beach, CA. What seems like a great home reveals an avalanche of problems from the front door to the garage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Shattered Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four bedroom, two bathroom home in Lakewood, CA. Their hopes and dreams of a great deal in a good neighbourhood are shattered, however, when they discover that the dilapidated house has been vandalized.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Money Mirage
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a gamble on a tri-level house in Irvine, CA, buying it sight unseen. The neighborhood is hot, but the house needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: It's a Dump
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Lakewood, CA, near one of their previous flips. They hope to repeat their past success, but modernizing an old house comes with a high price tag.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Stiff Competition
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in the upscale neighborhood of North Tustin, CA, but find competition from other investors. They'll need to act quickly or lose out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Covered Costs
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a risk on an unseen house in Orange, California, but they soon discover it's been vandalized and the owners covered a gross pool in the backyard. As more issues pop up, Tarek and Christina worry they won't recoup their costs.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip
programme.desc: When a good deal pops up, Tarek and Christina check out a home in La Mirada, California. What looks to be a quick flip soon turns out to be more difficult, however.

programme.title: Good Bones: Flooded Two-Story Restored

programme.title: Good Bones: Eyesore Overhaul

programme.title: Good Bones: Outdated Townhome Gets a Funky Facelift
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase an old townhome in the popular Bates-Hendricks neighborhood. After encountering dry rot and termites, the unpredictable roadblocks put a giant dent in their budget and on their attitudes toward the project.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong House Sitter
programme.desc: A man moves into his dream home just before leaving on assignment. He seeks out the perfect house-sitting to keep things in order while he is gone.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Real Estate Agent
programme.desc: A woman rents a home across from a real-estate agent that she knows. However, after she moves in, she begins to hear strange noises that lead her to believe she's not alone in the house.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Keeper of the Light

programme.title: Movie: The Girl From Mexico
programme.desc: A tempestuous cabaret entertainer campaigns for the affections of the man who hired her.

programme.title: Movie: Treasure Island
programme.desc: A cabin boy and a pirate match wits when they hunt for treasure on an island.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of G.I. Joe
programme.desc: War correspondent Ernie Pyle joins an Army platoon during the Second World War to learn what battle is really about.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants 2
programme.desc: Uma, Ursula's daughter, stirs her pirate gang to break the barrier between the Isle of the Lost and Auradon and to finally unleash the imprisoned villains once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: Descendants 3
programme.desc: The teenage daughters and sons of villains return to the Isle of the Lost to recruit more teens to join them at Auradon Prep. However, when a barrier breach threatens the safety of Auradon, Mal decides to close the barrier for good.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies
programme.desc: A group of teenage zombies enroll in Seabrook High School and work together to show Seabrook what they can achieve when they embrace their differences and celebrate what makes them a community.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies 2
programme.desc: A cheerleader and a football players are preparing to go off to their prom. They don't realize that they are facing danger, in the form of teenage werewolves that threaten to derail their plans for the perfect night.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Raven's Home: Remix
programme.desc: Booker sets out to land the starring role in the school's musical. Raven encourages him, however he needs Tess' help as the part involves basketball and rap, but he refuses her help because she's a girl.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part One: Frozen
programme.desc: When Booker freezes mid-vision, Raven takes him to Dr. Sleevemore, the same doctor who helped her when she was a teen.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Two: Found
programme.desc: When Nia discovers that Booker’s visions went into her eye, Tess convinces her to keep the visions for the next couple of weeks.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Three: Future
programme.desc: As Booker prepares for the vision transfer procedure, he learns Jasmine stole the visions from Nia the night before.

programme.title: Ruth & Ruby Virtual Sleepover: Charades Parade Challenge
Jessie: A Close Shave
programme.desc: Darla shows up and doesn't know that Jessie called off her wedding, so Jessie gets Tony to act like Brooks to try and fool her. Meanwhile, Luke is still trying to master the art of shaving his face for the first time.

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari
programme.desc: After misinterpreting that Jessie has gone to Africa to reunite with Brooks, the kids hop a private flight to Africa to stop her. Turns out, Jessie wasn't there, but now must go with Bertram to retrieve the kids.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Squatters' Fights
programme.desc: When Ava, Destiny, and Gwen discover that the Grizzly cabin has a much larger bathroom than theirs, they hatch a plan to convince the boys to switch.

programme.title: Raven's Home: School House Trap
programme.desc: Just as they are about to advance in the Radio Eclipse Competition, Raven threatens to end the band over Booker's bad grades.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cali Dreams
programme.desc: The kids head to L.A. with the whole family to compete in the finals of a music competition. When their competition doesn't play by the rules, the family comes together.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Neighbors-A-Rooney
programme.desc: During a neighbourly feud with the Dippledorfs, Liv rekindles an old friendship with Holden Dippledorf. Meanwhile, Joey becomes fascinated with a new member he meets at his weekly Intergalactic Council meeting.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Repeat-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv must finish a 6th-grade project to avoid taking summer school. Joey gets Maddie to teach him how to be a jock to impress a girl.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Burglaries and Boobytraps
programme.desc: After a thief burglarizes stores in the mall, Ally and Trish come up with a plan to catch the culprit. However, when the evidence points to Austin, they're forced to confront both him and Dez.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Tickets and Trashbags
programme.desc: Trish books Austin a gig singing at the Miami Internet Music Awards, but when he is only offered one ticket for a guest.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Finder's Keepers, Lou's a Weeper
programme.desc: Finn, Matteo, and Destiny fix up an old car as a present for Lou’s 10-year anniversary at Camp Kikiwaka. Emma, Ravi, and Zuri decide to throw Lou a surprise party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Weredad
programme.desc: Tom gets akumatized into Weredad, a huge monstrous guard dog-man who locks Marinette up in a magic prison to protect her from the outside world. Will Marinette manage to stop her own father.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: After losing a contest to become lead host on the Kidz Plus children's channel, Aurore is akumatized into Stormy Weather. With villainy in the forecast, it's up to Ladybug and Cat Noir to stop her and bring sunshine back to Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Bubbler
programme.desc: Armed with his magical bubble-wand, Nino becomes The Bubbler, a villain who wants to rid the city of all parents who get in the way of kids having fun. Ladybug and Cat Noir try to avoid his bubbles and save the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Copycat
programme.desc: When Cat Noir becomes a burglary suspect, Ladybug must prove his innocence. With a copycat version of Cat Noir prowling around Paris, however, Ladybug is hard-pressed to tell the difference between her partner and the imposter.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timebreaker
programme.desc: After Alix's friends break her father’s priceless watch, she is akumatized into Timebreaker.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Pharaoh
programme.desc: A young historian gets akumatized into the all-powerful Pharaoh. He wants to bring an Ancient Egyptian princess back to life by sacrificing Alya. To save her, Ladybug and Cat Noir must face an army of mummies outside the Louvre!

programme.title: Jessie: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: Emma wants her license, so Jessie teaches her how to drive. Ravi and Luke accidentally break one of Zuri's games, forcing a stand-off.

programme.title: Jessie: Capture the Nag
programme.desc: When the kids are snowed in at the penthouse, an epic game of capture the flag ensues. Allegiances are tested, tricks are pulled and everyone goes a little overboard.

programme.title: Jessie: Four Broke Kids
programme.desc: The Ross family faces an unexpected dilemma when they find out their parents have lost all their money and must learn to live without it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution
programme.desc: It's school dance time, and the Ross family pulls out all the stops to score dates. Meanwhile, Jessie helps Bertram prepare for his first solo at the Metropolitan Opera.

programme.title: Jessie: What a Steal
programme.desc: In an effort to help Ravi make friends, Jessie takes him to a MENSA meeting in the park. However, their new friends, Madeline and Scott, may be too good to be true.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part One
programme.desc: While on vacation, the Ross family finds a girl stranded in the middle of the ocean and invites her aboard their yacht. Meanwhile, Bertram stays home and babysits Mrs. Kipling, who has separation anxiety from Ravi.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Two
programme.desc: While exploring an Italian island, the Ross family's tour guide tells a story about Jessie's necklace, and how its curse brings anyone who wears it bad luck in love.

programme.title: Jessie: Rossed at Sea Part Three
programme.desc: Jessie abruptly ends the Ross family vacation because the kids are constantly fighting. They wind up in a pickle when they find the yacht the next morning floating in the middle of the sea with no captain or crew in sight.

programme.title: Jessie: Identity Thieves
programme.desc: When Luke becomes the brain of the family and Zuri the new trendy fashionista, Ravi and Emma feel their identities have been stolen.

programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: In the Dark of Night
programme.desc: The joy of Christmas looks bright for a doting Oklahoma Mom. But her kids wake up to a living nightmare when she's inexplicably gone. As investigators track two suspects down a deceitful road, an incendiary break lures the killer out of the dark.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: When Hell Freezes Over
programme.desc: When the car of a Southern California girl is found abandoned, investigators spend years and travel hundreds of miles trying to solve her mysterious disappearance. Finally, an unimaginable backyard discovery by drug agents leads to a vicious killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Witness to Murder
programme.desc: A Florida co-ed disappears after a night on the town. As investigators trace her last steps, they fear some missing girls at another campus might be connected. But when a dog sniffs out a backyard grave, the key to this mystery is far closer to home.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Saint and Sinner
programme.desc: A former Catholic priest turned realtor vanishes from Florida and investigators find themselves examining circumstances stranger than their suspects. When a tip exposes a murder-for-hire scheme, the mastermind is revealed as a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Fear in Florida
programme.desc: When a thriving real estate agent disappears, Florida investigators scrutinize the men in her life. But when other women vanish, something more sinister may be at play. It takes a risky escape from an abductor to finally unbury some horrific truths.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a skeletonized and dismembered corpse buried in the backyard of a Seattle home results in an investigation that unravels a 30-year-old murder plot hatched by a scheming, vindictive family.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Bloody New Years
programme.desc: Just before New Years, a hockey mom is gunned down at her front door. Later that night, seven more bodies are found in another suburban home. Police discover a shocking connection between the two crimes as they track down the killer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: New Year's Evil
programme.desc: New Year's in a tiny town, Joanna and Carl Dutcher ring in the year with their grandson. Days later, they are found violently killed. The hunt for the killer leads police to a sinister group that threatens the entire community.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a suspect that shocks everyone.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Dying to See You
programme.desc: When a popular college student is found slain in the middle of campus, police suspect his friends and lovers might be involved.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Engaged to a Killer
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in a Texas lake, investigators hunt down a killer on the run.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deadly Deceit
programme.desc: When a young man with big dreams is found dead, investigators follow the money to find his killer.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Death by Divorce
programme.desc: A mother of five is found dead in her home. Was she murdered, or was she hiding a dark secret?

programme.title: Killer Motive: A Hateful Crime
programme.desc: An outgoing, gender-fluid teenager is gunned down in a small town in Iowa.

programme.title: Dateline: Silent Witness
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in a field in the outskirts of Green Bay, Wisconsin and a Fitbit helps detectives solve the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Suspicion
programme.desc: After a woman, Teresa, disappears while working at her job on Halloween day, police investigate what could have happened. After many twists and turns, they finally begin to question a suspect that may have a haunting tale of his own.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers' car is abandoned in Bardstown, KY, the mother of 5 vanished. A year later her father is shot dead while searching for her. We discover there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: The Search Continues
programme.desc: The brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown Police Officer is grilled by the FBI. Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent. On the Bluegrass Parkway the scene of a deadly ambush is explored.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Cold And Calculating
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer. Family members of Bardstown's other victims speak. A mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: A Murder Most Foul
programme.desc: As the 1st anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaches, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward. An unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen and intriguing direction.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers: Final Days in Bardstown
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne speak with an informant who shares new information about the crimes in Bardstown. They follow up on the informant's claims and discover potential new details unknown to investigators.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Dog Gets An 'F'
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is enrolled in an obedience school after chewing up the house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge vs. Singles, Seniors, Childless Couples and Teens and Gays
programme.desc: Marge is outraged when a lawyer states that childless people shouldn't have to pay taxes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Serfsons
programme.desc: In a magical medieval world, Marge's mother is turned into an Ice Walker and the only way for Homer to afford the cure is to force Lisa to use illegal magic. When the King discovers this, he kidnaps Lisa, and Homer must lead a feudal uprising to save her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: One Fish, Two Fish, Blowfish, Blue Fish

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson in: 'Kidney Trouble'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Triple Bypass

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Am Furious Yellow

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart of Darkness

programme.title: The Simpsons: Alone Again Natura-Diddly
programme.desc: The Simpsons console a grieving friend after an untimely death occurs in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Fink

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Traction Hero

programme.desc: Bart embarks on a death defying feat after seeing a daredevil perform at a truck rally.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Iron Man Army
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates newly declassified documents that reveal the secrets of a multibillion-dollar mission to build a real-life Iron Man equipped with superhuman strength, cutting-edge weapons, and telepathic abilities.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
programme.desc: A top-secret government program might have proof that aliens have visited earth, and a former CIA operative uses newly declassified documents and special access to investigate if the US military already has its hands on advanced, alien technology.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda's only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition. Then a 29-year-old man moves back to Colorado Springs, but at his welcome home party he winds up shot execution-style.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he's barking up the wrong tree. Then when an impromptu argument turns fatal, a suspect's guilt boils down to his skill with deadly weapons.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: High in the mountains above Colorado Springs, a woman's frozen body is found along a switchback road. Before investigators can determine who's responsible for her death, they'll need to figure out what brought her here in the first place.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss. After 12 years of searching, they finally uncover the fiendish plot to exploit the helpless victim.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. Six months later however, Kenda receives an unprompted confession that propels the case in a whole new direction.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal. Could this stem from a dispute at his other job as a radio DJ? A failing marriage? The possibilities seem endless.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Married to the Job
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda and his officers are facing off against a barricaded gunman when he gets an emergency call from his wife. Kathy winds up overhearing him being shot at, leading her to grapple with the terrifying realities of being married to a cop.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet the slaying of a young boy. After confronting his own demons brought forth by the tragic case, the detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Disappeared: Against the Tide
programme.desc: Twenty-five year-old artist Tiffany Daniels never makes it home from work. When her car is found abandoned in a Pensacola Beach parking lot, it sets off a desperate search for the missing young woman...and dark speculation about her disappearance.

programme.title: Disappeared: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: Jessica Heeringa is working the night shift at a gas station. When a customer arrives just before closing to find the store empty, investigators believe she's been abducted.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Devil in Dallas
programme.desc: A woman and her 5-year-old son are brutally murdered in a field outside Dallas. A critical piece of evidence found at the scene sends one detective on a 20-year-long hunt for the killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A 59 year old grandmother is discovered beaten and stabbed to death in her home on Mother's Day.

programme.title: True Conviction: Shattered Home
programme.desc: The town of Indiana, Pennsylvania, is rocked by the murder of Theresa Dalessio. Shot at home with her family nearby, the crime is confounding. Theresa has no obvious enemies, but as evidence emerges, suspects are revealed - including her own husband.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Divorced and in Danger
programme.desc: A divorcee turns to the internet for romance and soon meets a sexy entrepreneur. But when she's found brutally murdered in her own home, detectives discover that Sheila was lured into the dark world of S&M.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run for the Door
programme.desc: In December 2013, 25-year-old Josh Richards was gunned down in the Luna Lounge nightclub in Appleton, Wisconsin. When detectives delve deeper into the investigation, they discover a camera has the potential to reveal the identity of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Boy in Blue
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2010, 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, a block from an earlier shooting. As police question if the two are related, only CCTV can help piece together the puzzle and ID Alajawan's killer.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters
programme.desc: Uncovering new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials and influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: UFOs: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Learn if deathbed confessions provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military. In fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space on Mars.

programme.title: Military UFO Encounters
programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts

programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Wing It Like Witches
programme.desc: Not your average underdog story.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Young Blood, Old Souls
programme.desc: Luz's skills as a witch are put to the test when she attempts the impossible.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Bed Bugs
Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Beyblade: Metal Masters: The Explosive Cyclone Battle
Phineas and Ferb: The Secret of Success/ The Doof Side of the Moon
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are building an ATV powerful enough to handle extreme terrains and even buildings. Meanwhile, Candace and Stacy go to a leadership retreat where Candace learns the steps needed to achieve her ultimate goal of busting her brothers.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms
programme.desc: When the kids are stranded alone in the woods on a school camping trip, Bailey and Chance split into rival groups over their only supply of food: Gummy Worms.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: No Debating Bailey
programme.desc: When Drama Drew transfers schools, Ms. Spencer hunts for a replacement debater to face off against him at upcoming the regional championships.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Say Good Night to J.D.
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.desc: Armando's first attempt at PDA ends badly. Ari questions living in Ethiopia after her mom leaves. Deavan attempts to improve her relationship with Jihoon's mom. Tim has a troubling job interview. Brittany and Yazan clash over her social media.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Ari hits her breaking point. Elicia doesn't want to leave Korea without Deavan. Armando prepares for Kenny and his family to meet. Brittany continues to lie to Yazan. Tim drops a bomb on Melyza. Sumit goes to confront his parents about Jenny.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Ready or Not
programme.desc: Sumit pleads with his parents to accept Jenny. Brittany arrives in Chicago hoping to finalize her divorce. Melyza reveals her secret. Armando is reluctant to tell his family about his engagement. Ari and Bini are shaken by unexpected news.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: The Consequences of Truth
programme.desc: Ari struggles with the news about her pregnancy. Deavan and Jihoon make a big move. Yazan starts to question his relationship with Brittany. Melyza reveals her secret to Tim. Armando's family reacts to his engagement to Kenny.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Bris-fully Ignorant
programme.desc: Ari makes a dramatic choice about her son's future. Deavan has suspicions about Jihoon's job. Kenny and Armando disagree on parenting style. Sumit faces criminal charges in court, and Brittany finally gets news about her divorce.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Are You Done Yelling?
programme.desc: Yazan begs for his brother's help. Sumit finally goes to court for his divorce. Kenny and Armando apply for a marriage license. Parenting decisions set Ari and Bini at odds. Deavan finds questionable photos on Jihoon's phone. Tim's mom comes for a visit.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Fight or Flight?
programme.desc: Brittany's return to Jordan doesn't go as planned, while Jenny and Sumit are sure nothing can stop them now. Tim's mom's arrival stirs up tensions. Bini's long work hours make Ari suspicious. Deavan and Jihoon face a tragedy and form a new family bond.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Not on My Watch
programme.desc: Jihoon dreads the return of Deavan's mom. Kenny and Armando fight for their right to marry. Jenny worries Sumit is getting cold feet. Ari's parents question her choices. Brittany and Yazan finally reunite. Tim gets advice on a big decision.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mustard O' Mine/ Shopping List

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad
programme.desc: When Lola advances to a regional pageant she worries she could lose for the first time. Dad has Mr. Grouse watch Lily while he goes to a concert but things quickly start to go wrong.

programme.title: The Loud House: Future Tense/ Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family, they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Strife of the Party/Kernel of Truth
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: An Academic Crime and a More Romantic Taco Bell
programme.desc: Dr. Sturgis is furious when Sheldon accuses him of plagiarism. Mary sets out to find a 'girl trophy' for Missy’s end-of-season baseball ceremony, and Georgie has an awkward run-in with Veronica while on a date with his new girlfriend, Jana.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Couple Bruised Ribs and a Cereal Box Ghost Detector
programme.desc: When George Sr. accidentally lands the school librarian, Ms. Hutchins, in the hospital, the Cooper family must nurse her back to health.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A House for Sale and Serious Woman Stuff
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns the house next door is for sale, he takes it upon himself to find the perfect neighbors. Also, Missy is torn when she’s forced to pitch against her boyfriend at the baseball game.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
programme.desc: Sheldon has a scientific breakthrough at the dentist’s office. Also, Dale and Meemaw go to the casino, and Georgie makes a big mistake when Dale leaves him in charge of the store.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: The attractive widowed father of Ross's new girlfriend makes a big impression on Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Paul's the Man
programme.desc: The father of Ross's coed girlfriend threatens to have him fired for dating a student.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ring
programme.desc: Chandler takes a chance when he secretly asks Phoebe to help him choose a special ring.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Proposal
programme.desc: Just as Chandler is about to propose, Monica's former boyfriend, Richard, returns.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Proposal

programme.desc: When Bonnie connects with a handsome, sober stranger, Christy worries that she's jeopardizing her relationship with Adam.

programme.title: Mom: Roast Chicken and a Funny Story
programme.desc: When a heartbroken Bonnie drives everyone crazy, Christy begs Adam to take her back.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Mom: Martinis and a Sponge Bath
programme.desc: When Christy and Adam get into a car accident, Bonnie is hurt to discover she is neither of their emergency contacts.

programme.title: Full House: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: D.J.'s duties as editor of the school newspaper cause a rift in her friendship with Kim.

programme.title: Full House: A Pinch for a Pinch
programme.desc: Jesse gives Michelle some very questionable advice and takes her out of preschool.

programme.title: Full House: Viva Las Joey
programme.desc: Joey takes his comedy act to Las Vegas, where his estranged father shows up unannounced.

programme.title: Full House: Shape Up
programme.desc: D.J. goes on crash diet so that she can wear a bikini to Kimmy's 14th birthday party.

programme.title: Full House: One Last Kiss
programme.desc: Although he's engaged to Rebecca, Jesse is still attracted to his high school sweetheart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Land/ The Camping Episode
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs builds a children's theme park; Pat and SpongeBob camp in the backyard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Save Our Shores
programme.desc: A huge trash spill at the beach endangers the local wildlife; Scrozzle sets about finding reinforcements.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid Noir/ ScavengerPants
programme.desc: When his clarinet goes missing, Squidward must become a hardboiled detective to track it down. Squidward sends SpongeBob and Patrick on an increasingly difficult scavenger hunt to get them out of his hair.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: Manny, Sid and Diego come to realize that the warm weather could spell trouble by melting a large glacial dam surrounding the valley. Along the way, Manny's fears of being the last woolly mammoth are diminished when he meets a female named Ellie.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Paranoia/ Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous. SpongeBob introduces Patrick to the wonderful world of book learning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Place/ Plankton Gets the Boot
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.When Plankton gets kicked out of the house, it's up to SpongeBob to teach him how to win his computer wife back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Tornados and Killer Bees
programme.desc: What do you do when a tornado is about to strike? Could you survive an attack of killer bees? Incredible caught-on-tape moments challenge you with live power lines, dangerous sinkholes, enormous blizzards, massive landslides and vicious sunburns!

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Deadly Cold
programme.desc: Rulon Gardner won the Greco-Roman wrestling gold medal in the 2000 Olympics. Two years later, he got soaked when his snowmobile was stuck in a river. With temperatures plunging to 25 below zero, he faced his toughest opponent: death.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Family Emergency
programme.desc: During a day hike in the mountains outside of Wellington, New Zealand, Carolyn and her daughter, Rachel became lost on the descent. With the temperature dropping, Carolyn desperately tries to get her daughter shelter and warmth.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Desert Heat
programme.desc: Celebrating their anniversary Rick and Cathy hiked a trail in the Texas desert. They lost track of their location and became dehydrated quickly. Cathy becomes unable to move and Rick becomes their only hope to survive.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Trapped in a Blizzard
programme.desc: The Kim family take a wrong turn and find themselves stuck in snow on a logging road. With no knowledge about how survive the cold and mountains the Kim's get desperate. After 3 days they run out of food, gas and hopes of another car coming to save them.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: North Woods Trapper
programme.desc: Creek and three strangers brave northern Michigan temperatures and as their hunting plans fail, the starving group resorts to eating tree bark and a squirrel. Frustrations peak when the guys are abandoned for the last cold, rainy night.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Lumberjack 101
programme.desc: Creek and three football coaches build a log cabin lean-to shelter and face getting lost in Drummond Island's vast, frozen forest on their hunt for food. Too far from camp, a lucky find quickly turns into an emergency situation before night falls.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Bare Bones Survival
programme.desc: Creek and three guys use primitive skills to stay alive in Mendoza Canyon, Arizona’s harsh environment. They create a bare bones shelter made up of desert reed mats and use the backbreaking 'sotol fire saw' method.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Operation Desert Patrol
programme.desc: Creek and three guys consult a survival manual as they trek 30 miles through Arizona's Sonoran Desert. A week in a parachute-teepee with little water, disgusting desert grub and failed fire attempts prove to be both mentally and physically exhausting.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Man-Made Earthquakes
programme.desc: Scientists struggle to understand earthquakes, but new research has revealed that earthquakes can be triggered by not just from within the earth, but also by damns and reservoirs, mines and the oil drilling technique called fracking.

programme.title: Secrets of the Earth: Death Traps: Quicksand, Whirlpools and Riptides
programme.desc: The interaction that land and water has to the Earth not only nurtures life but can also cause strange death traps. Quicksand, whirlpools and rip currents are death traps, ready to take away the unwary.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Noisy Nature
programme.desc: In this episode, the weather creates a strange symphony. Light sabre sounds mysteriously resonate from icy lakes, rocks ring like bells and deadly multiple twisters roar and rage across the earth.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Sand Tsunami
programme.desc: Witness haboobs, hoodoos, ice chimneys and a lake with leopard spots.

programme.desc: Celia may lose her hoarded home of shoplifted items and her illegal hoard of dogs if she doesn't get under control. Nathan did not feel accepted after coming out as gay.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Chaos ensues during a brawl in a courtroom; a bailiff dives down a flight of stairs after an escapee; a defendant threatens a judge's life.
